<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Chakiri Shanmukha Sai — AI & ML Engineer</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --bg: #0a0a0f;
    --surface: #12121a;
    --card: #1a1a26;
    --border: #2a2a40;
    --accent: #6c63ff;
    --accent2: #00d4aa;
    --text: #e8e8f0;
    --muted: #8888aa;
    --white: #ffffff;
  }
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* NAV */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.2rem 6vw;
    background: rgba(10,10,15,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .nav-logo span { color: var(--accent); }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }

  /* HERO */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4rem;
    padding: 8rem 6vw 4rem;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: -20%; right: -10%;
    width: 600px; height: 600px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(108,99,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 65%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 30%;
    width: 400px; height: 400px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,212,170,0.08) 0%, transparent 65%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-text { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent2);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: ''; width: 32px; height: 2px; background: var(--accent2);
  }
  h1 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.05;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: -0.03em;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  h1 .highlight {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }
  .hero-tagline {
    font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--muted); max-width: 480px;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem; line-height: 1.7;
  }
  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.85rem 1.75rem;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600;
    border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--accent); color: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: #7b74ff; transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--text);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--white); transform: translateY(-1px); }

  /* PHOTO */
  .hero-photo {
    display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .photo-frame {
    position: relative; width: 320px; height: 380px;
  }
  .photo-frame::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; inset: -3px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2), var(--accent));
    border-radius: 20px; z-index: -1;
    animation: rotateBorder 6s linear infinite;
    background-size: 200% 200%;
  }
  @keyframes rotateBorder {
    0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
    100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  }
  .photo-frame img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover; border-radius: 18px;
    display: block;
  }
  .photo-badge {
    position: absolute; bottom: -16px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 30px;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .badge-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent2); 
    box-shadow: 0 0 6px var(--accent2);
    animation: pulse 2s infinite;
  }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }

  /* STATS */
  .stats-row {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem; margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .stat { text-align: center; }
  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem;
    font-weight: 800; color: var(--white);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
  }
  .stat-label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }

  /* SECTIONS */
  section { padding: 6rem 6vw; }
  .section-header { margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
  .section-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .section-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--accent); }
  h2 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
    font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }

  /* SKILLS */
  .skills-section { background: var(--surface); }
  .skills-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .skill-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.75rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .skill-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .skill-card-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .skill-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }
  .tag {
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px;
    background: rgba(108,99,255,0.12); color: var(--accent);
    border: 1px solid rgba(108,99,255,0.25);
  }
  .tag.green {
    background: rgba(0,212,170,0.10); color: var(--accent2);
    border-color: rgba(0,212,170,0.2);
  }

  /* EXPERIENCE */
  .timeline { position: relative; }
  .timeline::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 2px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
  }
  .timeline-item { display: flex; gap: 2rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; position: relative; }
  .timeline-dot {
    flex-shrink: 0; width: 40px; height: 40px;
    border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--accent);
    background: var(--bg); display: flex; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; z-index: 1;
  }
  .timeline-content {
    flex: 1; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem; margin-top: -8px;
  }
  .timeline-content:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .timeline-meta {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
    flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .timeline-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); font-size: 1rem; }
  .timeline-company { color: var(--accent2); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .timeline-period {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted);
    background: var(--surface); padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .timeline-content ul { list-style: none; }
  .timeline-content ul li {
    font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6;
    padding-left: 1rem; position: relative; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .timeline-content ul li::before {
    content: '▹'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--accent);
  }

  /* PROJECTS */
  .projects-section { background: var(--surface); }
  .projects-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .project-card::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
    transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .project-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .project-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .project-num {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .project-card h3 {
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .project-card p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.65; }
  .project-stack { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }

  /* CERTS */
  .certs-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .cert-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem;
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .cert-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent2); }
  .cert-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent2), var(--accent));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .cert-info h4 { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .cert-info p { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .cert-badge {
    font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    background: rgba(0,212,170,0.1); color: var(--accent2);
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,170,0.2); border-radius: 4px;
    margin-top: 0.4rem; display: inline-block;
  }

  /* CONTACT */
  .contact-section {
    background: var(--surface);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .contact-section .section-header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .contact-section .section-eyebrow { justify-content: center; }
  .contact-section p { color: var(--muted); max-width: 500px; margin: 0.75rem auto 2.5rem; }
  .contact-links { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .contact-link {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
    padding: 0.9rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 10px;
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .contact-link:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--white); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .contact-link svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }

  /* EDUCATION */
  .edu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .edu-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.75rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s;
  }
  .edu-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
  .edu-card h4 { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .edu-school { color: var(--accent2); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .edu-meta { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
  .edu-year { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--muted); }
  .edu-gpa {
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(108,99,255,0.12); color: var(--accent);
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(108,99,255,0.25);
  }

  /* FOOTER */
  footer {
    padding: 2rem 6vw; text-align: center;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--muted); font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  /* RESPONSIVE */
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; text-align: center; gap: 3rem; padding-top: 6rem; }
    .hero-photo { order: -1; }
    .photo-frame { width: 220px; height: 260px; }
    .hero-eyebrow { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-cta { justify-content: center; }
    .hero-tagline { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
    .stats-row { grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .timeline::before { display: none; }
    .timeline-item { flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
    .timeline-dot { display: none; }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">CSS<span>.</span></div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="about">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Available for Opportunities</div>
    <h1>
      Chakiri<br>
      Shanmukha <span class="highlight">Sai</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">
      AI & ML Engineer with expertise in deep learning, computer vision, NLP, and intelligent process automation. Google TensorFlow Certified. 2025 B.Tech Graduate.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-primary">Get in Touch</a>
      <a href="#projects" class="btn btn-outline">View Projects</a>
    </div>
    <div class="stats-row">
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">8.69</div>
        <div class="stat-label">B.Tech CGPA</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">4+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Certifications</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">2+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Internships</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-photo">
    <div class="photo-frame">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Chakiri Shanmukha Sai">
      <div class="photo-badge">
        <span class="badge-dot"></span>
        Open to Work
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="skills-section" id="skills">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Expertise</div>
    <h2>Technical Skills</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">🤖</div>
      <h3>AI & Machine Learning</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">TensorFlow</span>
        <span class="tag">Keras</span>
        <span class="tag">Scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="tag">CNN</span>
        <span class="tag">Deep Learning</span>
        <span class="tag">NLP</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">👁️</div>
      <h3>Computer Vision</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">OpenCV</span>
        <span class="tag">Haar Cascade</span>
        <span class="tag">Dlib</span>
        <span class="tag">Image Processing</span>
        <span class="tag">CNN</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">💻</div>
      <h3>Programming</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">Java</span>
        <span class="tag">C</span>
        <span class="tag">NumPy</span>
        <span class="tag">Pandas</span>
        <span class="tag">Matplotlib</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">☁️</div>
      <h3>Cloud & DevOps</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag green">AWS SageMaker</span>
        <span class="tag green">EC2</span>
        <span class="tag green">Git</span>
        <span class="tag green">GitHub</span>
        <span class="tag green">Jupyter</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">⚙️</div>
      <h3>Automation & RPA</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag green">Automation Anywhere</span>
        <span class="tag green">Bot Development</span>
        <span class="tag green">IPA</span>
        <span class="tag green">Process Automation</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-card">
      <div class="skill-card-icon">🌐</div>
      <h3>Web Development</h3>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="tag">HTML5</span>
        <span class="tag">CSS3</span>
        <span class="tag">JavaScript</span>
        <span class="tag">REST APIs</span>
        <span class="tag">MySQL</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="experience">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Work History</div>
    <h2>Experience</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot">🧠</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <div class="timeline-meta">
          <div>
            <div class="timeline-title">AI/ML Virtual Intern</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">AICTE × Amazon Web Services (AWS)</div>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-period">Jan 2024 – Apr 2024</span>
        </div>
        <ul>
          <li>Built and evaluated ML models for classification, regression, and clustering using Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, and NumPy.</li>
          <li>Deployed AI/ML models on AWS Cloud (SageMaker, EC2); completed labs in neural networks, deep learning, and NLP.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot">🌐</div>
      <div class="timeline-content">
        <div class="timeline-meta">
          <div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Web Application Developer — Social Intern</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Swecha Andhra Pradesh | Bridge the Digital Divide | KL University</div>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-period">Jun 2023 – Aug 2023</span>
        </div>
        <ul>
          <li>Built responsive web apps with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript; developed backend REST APIs with Python/Java and MySQL.</li>
          <li>Participated in agile team covering requirement analysis, testing, deployment, and maintenance.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="projects-section" id="projects">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Portfolio</div>
    <h2>Featured Projects</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">Project 01</div>
      <h3>Movie Recommendation System</h3>
      <p>Content-based and collaborative filtering recommendation engine using cosine similarity, backed by a full-stack web interface and MySQL database for persistent user data.</p>
      <div class="project-stack">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">Scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="tag">Pandas</span>
        <span class="tag">MySQL</span>
        <span class="tag">HTML/CSS/JS</span>
        <span class="tag">Git</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="project-num">Project 02</div>
      <h3>Stress Detection via Facial Expressions</h3>
      <p>Real-time CNN model that classifies stress levels from both static facial images and live video streams, using Haar Cascade and Dlib for accurate face detection and localization.</p>
      <div class="project-stack">
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">OpenCV</span>
        <span class="tag">TensorFlow</span>
        <span class="tag">Keras</span>
        <span class="tag">CNN</span>
        <span class="tag">Dlib</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="certifications">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Credentials</div>
    <h2>Certifications</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="certs-grid">
    <div class="cert-card">
      <div class="cert-icon">🏆</div>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <h4>Google TensorFlow Developer</h4>
        <p>Issued Apr 2024 · Valid till Apr 2027</p>
        <p>ID: 100360737</p>
        <span class="cert-badge">✓ Verified</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-card">
      <div class="cert-icon">🤖</div>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <h4>AI & Machine Learning using Python — Level 2</h4>
        <p>Algorithms, NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Model Evaluation</p>
        <span class="cert-badge">✓ Certified</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-card">
      <div class="cert-icon">⚙️</div>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <h4>Automation Anywhere Professional Certified</h4>
        <p>Bot Creation, Task Automation, Process Optimization</p>
        <span class="cert-badge">✓ Certified</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-card">
      <div class="cert-icon">☁️</div>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <h4>Aviatrix Certified Engineer</h4>
        <p>Multicloud Network Associate — AWS, Azure, GCP</p>
        <span class="cert-badge">✓ Certified</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="education">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Academic Background</div>
    <h2>Education</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="edu-grid">
    <div class="edu-card">
      <h4>B.Tech — CSE (AI & Intelligent Process Automation)</h4>
      <div class="edu-school">KL University, Vijayawada</div>
      <div class="edu-meta">
        <span class="edu-year">2021 – 2025</span>
        <span class="edu-gpa">CGPA 8.69</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <h4>Bachelor of Business Management (Dual Degree)</h4>
      <div class="edu-school">KL Business School</div>
      <div class="edu-meta">
        <span class="edu-year">2022 – 2025</span>
        <span class="edu-gpa">CGPA 7.60</span>
      </div>
    </div>

      <h4>Class XII</h4>
      <div class="edu-school">Sri Sarada College, Andhra Pradesh</div>
      <div class="edu-meta">
        <span class="edu-year">2019 – 2021</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="edu-card">
      <h4>Class X (SSC)</h4>
      <div class="edu-school">N. St. Mathews Public School</div>
      <div class="edu-meta">
        <span class="edu-year">2018 – 2019</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact-section" id="contact">
  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Let's Connect</div>
    <h2>Get in Touch</h2>
    <p>Open to AI/ML, Data Science, and Software Development roles. Let's build something great.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="contact-links">
    <a href="mailto:shanmukhasaic@gmail.com" class="contact-link">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="m22 7-8.97 5.7a1.94 1.94 0 0 1-2.06 0L2 7"/></svg>

    </a>

</section>
